_description: A mental wellness app with guided meditations, mood tracking, and therapist matching.
idea_normalised: A mental wellness platform with daily guided meditations, mood journaling, therapist discovery, and breathing exercises for busy professionals.

brand_config.logo_concept: Soft wave or calm ripple in muted teal
brand_config.target_audience: Busy professionals aged 25-45 dealing with work stress and burnout

features: Stress score based on mood patterns
Apple Health and Google Fit integration
Personalised daily plan based on mood

problem: Therapy is expensive and hard to access
Generic wellness apps don't personalise to mood
lean_canvas_json.solution: An AI-guided wellness platform that adapts daily recommendations to your mood
lean_canvas_json.unique_value_proposition: Personalised daily calm — not just meditation, a complete wellness companion
lean_canvas_json.unfair_advantage: Mood-adaptive recommendations + therapist marketplace in one app
